basics.name: Shashank Chakrawarty
basics.title: Data Engineering Architect | ETL Specialist | Apache Airflow, Databricks | Spark, Trino, SQL | Redshift, BigQuery, Synapse | Delta Tables, Delta Lake | Azure, AWS, GCP | Docker | ADF Specialist
basics.intro: I am a Data Engineering and Cloud Analytics Specialist with over 4 years of experience in designing and optimizing scalable data pipelines, cloud-native architectures, and real-time analytics platforms. My expertise spans across various domains including marketing, SEO, CRM, and enterprise data ecosystems.
profileSummary: Passionate about leveraging technology to drive data-driven decision-making and enhance business outcomes.
Strong proficiency in tools such as Azure Databricks, BigQuery, and Apache Spark, enabling the delivery of high-performance data solutions.
Proven track record of improving processing efficiency, reducing costs, and ensuring data governance and compliance.
Recognized by stakeholders for the ability to translate complex technical solutions into clear business outcomes, leading to improved ROI and customer engagement.
basics.location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India / London Area, UK

achievements.context: Achieved 20% cost savings while accelerating query performance by 35% through advanced data optimization.
Eliminated 40% of manual effort, reduced customer churn by 40%, and improved campaign effectiveness by 50%.
Elevated data governance standards, improving data integrity by 20% and cutting GDPR violations by 95%.
Accelerated data acquisition by 50% through end-to-end automation.
Reduced data errors by 70% and increased processing efficiency by 40%.

experience.description: In my current role at Forbes Advisor, I have engineered a scalable SEO data pipeline that has significantly improved data ingestion efficiency by 40% and enhanced SEO analytics accuracy by 25%. I have also optimized BigQuery performance, which has reduced query execution time by 30%, enabling near real-time analytics. Additionally, I implemented real-time Slack alerts that improved team response time by 20% and enhanced Google Analytics stream and batch processing, reducing data processing duration by 35%.
bullets: Engineered a scalable SEO data pipeline, improving data ingestion efficiency by 40% and SEO analytics accuracy by 25%.
Optimized BigQuery performance, reducing query execution time by 30% to enable near real-time analytics.
Implemented real-time Slack alerts, improving team response time by 20%.
Enhanced Google Analytics stream and batch processing, reducing data processing duration by 35%.

experience.description: At The Modern Data Company, I integrated multi-platform enterprise data, which delivered a 70% ROI and improved processing efficiency by 30% through infrastructure migration. I led the API-CRM integration that reduced manual data entry by 40%, enabling revenue growth. My efforts in optimizing Spark performance and strengthening data security resulted in a 35% improvement in efficiency and a 35% reduction in compliance incidents. I also implemented data governance frameworks that increased customer engagement and retention by 30%. Also served as Analytics Engineer, leading deployment of sophisticated data obfuscation solutions in Azure SQL Database and Redshift.
bullets: Integrated multi-platform enterprise data, delivering 70% ROI and improving processing efficiency by 30% through infrastructure migration.
Led API–CRM integration, reducing manual data entry by 40% and enabling revenue growth.
Optimized Spark performance and strengthened data security, improving efficiency by 35% and reducing compliance incidents by 35%.
Implemented data governance frameworks, increasing customer engagement and retention by 30%.
Executed detailed data governance protocols, utilizing Azure SQL Database and Redshift, resulting in a 30% spike in customer engagement and retention.

experience.description: During my tenure at RTB Analytica, I automated multi-source data pipelines, including Facebook Graph API, Klaviyo, and Google, which cut processing time by 40%. I drove cross-functional data consolidation that reduced end-to-end processing time by 25%. Additionally, I built enterprise-grade data quality monitoring systems that reduced data errors by 40%.
bullets: Automated multi-source data pipelines (Facebook Graph API, Klaviyo, Google), cutting processing time by 40%.
Drove cross-functional data consolidation, reducing end-to-end processing time by 25%.
Built enterprise-grade data quality monitoring, reducing data errors by 40%.
